rationale_overall: At cap (24 of 24) with full coverage of every profile-named wave: AI/semis (AAPL, MSFT, GOOGL, NVDA, AMD, TSM = 6), AI-applied/robotics (BOTZ, ISRG, CGNX = 3), space (RKLB, ARKX = 2), defense (LMT, NOC, ITA = 3), nuclear (CCJ, URA, CEG, BWXT = 4), quantum (IONQ = 1), geopolitical_energy (LNG, XLE = 2), cyber as a secondary geopolitical exposure (CIBR = 1), broad-market hedge (SPY, XLV = 2). Q1 2023 catalysts reinforce rather than rotate the book: GPT-4 launches 2023-03-14 and Microsoft's $10B OpenAI investment (2023-01-23) ties MSFT and Azure directly to the LLM ramp, validating the AI/semi cluster already on the watchlist (NVDA, AMD, TSM, MSFT, GOOGL). The SVB collapse (2023-03-10) and the regional-bank stress that followed are a financials event, not an AI-wave event — the profile excludes financials sector tilts and the watchlist already avoids banks. Defense names (LMT, NOC, ITA) continue to ride the post-Ukraine NATO 2%-of-GDP floor with the Biden FY24 budget request (2023-03-09) seeking $842B for DoD, a +3.2% YoY lift. Nuclear (CCJ, URA, CEG, BWXT) backed by ongoing uranium contracting and the bipartisan ADVANCE Act movement. RKLB completed its first Electron mission from Virginia (2023-01-24) and its 34th overall (2023-03-24), validating the launch-cadence thesis. Quantum still pre-revenue but IONQ remains the only US-listed pure-play and the profile lists quantum as a named next-wave. Engineered biology is explicitly excluded by the profile, so no synbio adds. No thesis is broken, every wave is represented, and forcing a pair-swap at this date would be churn for its own sake. no_changes is the disciplined call.

news_evidence.summary: OpenAI releases GPT-4, a multimodal LLM that outperforms GPT-3.5 on most benchmarks — validates the LLM/AI-compute thesis already covered by NVDA/AMD/TSM/MSFT/GOOGL on the watchlist. No new ticker needed.

Microsoft announces a multi-year, multi-billion (reported $10B) extension of its OpenAI partnership, deepening Azure as the exclusive cloud for OpenAI workloads — directly reinforces MSFT's AI-wave exposure.
Biden FY24 budget request seeks $842B for DoD (+3.2% YoY), with explicit emphasis on munitions production and Pacific deterrence — multi-year tailwind for LMT, NOC, ITA already on the watchlist.

Rocket Lab launches Electron's first mission from Virginia ('Virginia is for Launch Lovers'), opening US-soil cadence for RKLB; followed by 34th overall Electron mission 2023-03-24. RKLB and ARKX launch-cadence thesis intact.
Cameco Q4 2022 results show 2022 was the largest uranium contracting year since Fukushima, with utilities locking in long-term supply — confirms CCJ/URA nuclear-revival thesis on the watchlist.

SVB shut down by California regulators after $42B one-day deposit run; broader regional-bank stress follows. Financials-sector event, not an AI-wave catalyst. Profile excludes financials tilts and the watchlist already avoids banks — no action.
